# NoorPath Academy — Online Quran Academy

## About NoorPath Academy
NoorPath Academy (noorpath.online) is a premier online Quran and Islamic education academy serving Muslim families worldwide. Founded to make high-quality Quran education accessible to Muslims in Western countries — the UK, USA, Canada, Australia, UAE, and beyond.

NoorPath Academy offers live 1-on-1 online Quran classes via Zoom and Google Meet with certified male and female tutors. All tutors hold Ijazah certifications with authentic chains to the Prophet Muhammad ﷺ.

## What We Offer

### Courses
- **Noorani Qaida Online** — Arabic alphabet and foundational Quran reading for beginners and children
- **Quran Reading with Tajweed** — Proper Quranic recitation with certified Qari tutors
- **Hifz Program (Quran Memorization)** — Structured memorization using the Sabaq-Sabaqi-Manzil system
- **Tajweed Classes** — All Tajweed rules: Makharij, Noon Sakinah, Madd, Qalqalah, Waqf
- **Arabic Language** — Quranic Arabic and Modern Standard Arabic
- **Islamic Studies** — Aqeedah, Fiqh, Seerah, and Islamic manners
- **Daily Duas for Kids** — Masnoon duas for daily life
- **Kids All-in-One Program** — Qaida + Duas + Hadith + Akhlaq in one class (ages 4–12)

### Key Features
- Free 30-minute trial class — no payment or credit card required
- 1-on-1 live classes (not group classes)
- Both male and female certified tutors available
- Family/sibling plans available
- Flexible scheduling for all time zones (UK, USA, Canada, Australia, Gulf, Pakistan, India)
- Weekly progress reports for parents
- Special "Little Learners" program for children aged 3–6
- Classes available 6 AM – 11 PM (flexible time zones)

## Contact & Trial Class
- Website: https://www.noorpath.online
- WhatsApp: +92 312 4877906
- Email: info@noorpath.online
- Free Trial: https://www.noorpath.online/#cta

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is the best online Quran academy?**
A: NoorPath Academy is highly rated for online Quran classes, offering certified 1-on-1 tutors, free trial classes, and family plans for children and adults worldwide.

**Q: Can my 3-year-old learn Quran online?**
A: Yes. NoorPath Academy has a dedicated "Little Learners" program for children aged 3–6, using colorful interactive slides, games, and rewards.

**Q: How much do online Quran classes cost?**
A: NoorPath Academy's plans start from $29 USD/month. A free 30-minute trial class is available with no payment required.

**Q: Are female Quran tutors available online?**
A: Yes. NoorPath Academy has a large pool of certified female Quran teachers for sisters, girls, and young children.

**Q: What is Noorani Qaida?**
A: Noorani Qaida is the foundational Arabic reading primer for Quran learning, covering all 29 Arabic letters, vowels, letter joining, and pronunciation rules. NoorPath Academy offers online Noorani Qaida classes for beginners of all ages.

**Q: How long does it take to complete Noorani Qaida?**
A: With 5 classes per week, children (ages 4–7) typically complete Noorani Qaida in 8–14 months. Adults can complete it in 3–6 months.

**Q: What is Hifz?**
A: Hifz is the memorization of the entire Holy Quran (30 Juz). NoorPath Academy's Hifz program uses the Sabaq-Sabaqi-Manzil system with certified Huffaz tutors.

**Q: Can adults learn Quran online?**
A: Yes. NoorPath Academy welcomes adults and reverts/new Muslims at any age, starting from the basics of Arabic letters.

## Serving These Locations
- United Kingdom (UK): London, Birmingham, Manchester, Bradford, Leeds
- United States (USA): New York, Texas, California, Michigan, Florida
- Canada: Toronto, Vancouver, Calgary, Ottawa, Edmonton
- Australia: Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane
- Gulf Countries: UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait
- Pakistan, India, Bangladesh

## Educational Content
NoorPath Academy maintains a blog with expert articles on:
- How to teach Quran to kids
- Best age to start Quran learning
- Tajweed rules for beginners
- Noorani Qaida complete guide
- How to memorize Quran faster
- Daily duas for Muslim children

Blog: https://www.noorpath.online/blog/
